name: JWT Auth
description: Automatically fetch and refresh JWT tokens when skill config.yaml has need_authentication=true. Tokens are written to ~/.openclaw/jwt/{skill_name}.txt and refreshed every 45 minutes.

jwtUrl.description: POST endpoint to obtain a JWT token (e.g. https://toca.17u.cn/open-api/auth/openclaw-jwt)

memberUniqueId.description: Member unique ID sent in the JWT request body

expireMinutes.description: JWT expiry in minutes (optional, server default is 60)

refreshIntervalMinutes.description: How often to refresh the JWT (minutes). Default: 45

skillsDir.description: Custom skills directory path (default: auto-detect from cwd/skills and ~/.openclaw/skills)
